metadata.title: Privacy Policy - SoMedia
metadata.description: Learn how SoMedia collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

intro.heading: 1. Introduction
intro.content:
SoMedia (SoMedia Tech, hereinafter 'SoMedia', 'we', 'our', or 'platform') values your privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, share, and protect your personal information when you use our social media management and link shortening platform available at https://somedia.techbe.me (the 'Service').

By accessing or using the Service, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.

controller.heading: 2. Data Controller
controller.content:
The controller responsible for processing your personal data is:

SoMedia Tech
Email: privacy@somedia.techbe.me
Website: https://somedia.techbe.me

For privacy-related questions, please contact us at the email above.

dataCollected.heading: 3. Data We Collect
dataCollected.content:
We collect the following types of personal data:

3.1. Registration Data
- Full name
- Email address
- Profile picture (when provided or obtained via OAuth)

3.2. Authentication Data
- Login credentials (passwords encrypted with bcrypt)
- Session tokens
- OAuth authentication data (Google)

3.3. Social Account Data
When you connect social media accounts (Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, TikTok, X), we collect:
- Account ID on the platform
- Username and display name
- Profile picture
- Access and refresh tokens (stored encrypted)
- Public metadata (follower count, etc.)

3.4. API Credentials Data
- App ID / Client ID of social platforms (stored encrypted)
- App Secret / Client Secret (stored encrypted)
- Configured redirect URIs

3.5. Short Link Data
- Original URL
- Custom slug
- Title, description, and Open Graph images
- Click data (IP, country, city, device, browser, operating system, language, timezone, referrer)

3.6. Media Data
- Media files uploaded to the library (stored on Vercel Blob)
- File metadata (MIME type, size, dimensions)

3.7. Posts and Scheduling Data
- Post content
- Associated media URLs
- Target platforms
- Scheduling date and time
- Publication status

3.8. Usage and Analytics Data
- IP address
- Browser user-agent
- Approximate geolocation data
- Platform usage patterns

3.9. Payment Data (when applicable)
- Subscription and billing information
- Payment history (processed via Stripe)

3.10. Webhook Data
- Events received from third-party platforms (full payloads for audit and idempotency purposes)

purposes.heading: 4. Purposes of Processing
purposes.content:
We use your personal data for the following purposes:

4.1. Service Provision
- Create and manage your account
- Authenticate your access to the platform
- Connect and manage your social media accounts
- Enable post scheduling and publishing
- Provide short link analytics
- Store and manage your media library

4.2. Communication
- Send notifications about scheduled posts
- Security alerts and account changes
- Respond to support requests

4.3. Service Improvement
- Analyze usage patterns to improve the platform
- Identify and fix technical issues
- Develop new features

4.4. Security and Legal Compliance
- Prevent fraud and abuse
- Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
- Resolve disputes and enforce our terms

legalBasis.heading: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.content:
The processing of your personal data is based on the following legal grounds, in accordance with the General Data Protection Law (LGPD - Law 13,709/2018) and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR, when applicable):

5.1. Contract Execution (Art. 7, V of LGPD / Art. 6, I(b) of GDPR)
Processing is necessary for the execution of the service provision contract or for preliminary procedures to contracting at the request of the data subject.

5.2. Consent (Art. 7, I of LGPD / Art. 6, I(a) of GDPR)
For connecting social media accounts, sending marketing communications, and using non-essential cookies, we request your explicit consent, which can be revoked at any time.

5.3. Legal Obligation Compliance (Art. 7, II of LGPD / Art. 6, I(c) of GDPR)
When necessary to comply with legal obligations, such as retention of tax records.

5.4. Legitimate Interest (Art. 7, IX of LGPD / Art. 6, I(f) of GDPR)
For fraud prevention, platform security, and service improvement, provided that your fundamental rights and freedoms do not prevail.

5.5. Credit Protection (Art. 7, V of LGPD)
For risk assessment and credit granting, when applicable.

dataSharing.heading: 6. Data Sharing
dataSharing.content:
We may share your personal data in the following situations:

6.1. Service Providers
We use third-party providers for hosting, payment processing, file storage, and analytics. These providers have limited access to data strictly necessary to perform their functions and are contractually obligated to protect your data:

- Vercel (hosting and blob storage)
- Neon (PostgreSQL database)
- Stripe (payment processing)
- Upstash (rate limiting via Redis)
- Google (OAuth authentication)

6.2. Social Media Platforms
When you connect your accounts, we share necessary data with the respective platforms (Meta, Google, TikTok, X) to enable content publishing. Each platform has its own privacy policy.

6.3. Legal Obligations
We may disclose personal data when required by law, court order, or valid government request.

6.4. Business Transfers
In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your data may be transferred as part of the business, with prior notice.

6.5. We Do Not Sell Data
We do not sell, rent, or commercialize your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.

dataRetention.heading: 7. Data Retention and Deletion
dataRetention.content:
We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law:

7.1. Account Data
Retained while your account is active. After account closure, data is deleted or anonymized within 90 days, except when there is a legal obligation to retain.

7.2. Link and Analytics Data
Retained for the period defined by the user (configurable in preferences). By default, click data is kept for 12 months.

7.3. Webhook Data
Retained for 24 months for audit and idempotency purposes.

7.4. Payment Data
Retained for the period required by applicable tax legislation (generally 5 years in Brazil).

7.5. Backups
Deleted data may remain in backups for up to 30 additional days before complete removal.

userRights.heading: 8. Your Rights
userRights.content:
In accordance with the LGPD and GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

8.1. LGPD Rights (Brazil)
- Confirmation of the existence of processing
- Access to data
- Correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data
- Anonymization, blocking, or deletion of unnecessary, excessive, or unlawfully processed data
- Portability of data to another service or product provider
- Deletion of personal data processed with consent
- Information about public and private entities with which we share data
- Information about the possibility of not providing consent and the consequences of refusal
- Revocation of consent

8.2. GDPR Rights (European Union)
- Right of access (Art. 15)
- Right to rectification (Art. 16)
- Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten') (Art. 17)
- Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18)
- Right to data portability (Art. 20)
- Right to object (Art. 21)
- Rights related to automated decision-making (Art. 22)

8.3. How to Exercise Your Rights
To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@somedia.techbe.me. We will respond within 15 days (LGPD) or 30 days (GDPR). We may request identity verification before processing your request.

cookies.heading: 9. Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.content:
We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, analyze platform usage, and personalize content:

9.1. Essential Cookies
Necessary for the basic functioning of the platform, such as authentication and security. Cannot be disabled.

9.2. Preference Cookies
Remember your language, theme, and other personalized settings.

9.3. Analytics Cookies
Used to understand how users interact with the platform, identify issues, and improve the service.

9.4. Marketing Cookies
Used to deliver relevant ads and measure campaign effectiveness (when applicable).

9.5. Cookie Management
You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings. Note that disabling essential cookies may compromise platform functionality.

security.heading: 10. Data Security
security.content:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction:

10.1. Encryption
- Sensitive data (access tokens, API credentials) is encrypted at rest
- Communication with the platform is protected by TLS/SSL (HTTPS)

10.2. Authentication
- Passwords stored with bcrypt (adaptive hashing)
- Support for two-factor authentication (when enabled)
- Sessions with automatic expiration

10.3. Access Control
- Data access restricted to authorized personnel
- Audit logs for activity tracking
- Rate limiting to prevent abuse

10.4. Backups
- Regular encrypted backups
- Periodic recovery testing

10.5. Limitations
While we strive to protect your data, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

internationalTransfers.heading: 11. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.content:
Your personal data may be transferred and processed in countries other than the one in which you reside. Our service providers (Vercel, Neon, Stripe) operate in various countries, including the United States.

When transferring data outside Brazil or the European Union, we ensure that transfers are carried out with adequate safeguards, including:

- Standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission
- Adequacy certifications (Privacy Shield, when applicable)
- Technical and organizational measures to ensure an equivalent level of protection

By using our Service, you consent to these international transfers.

children.heading: 12. Children's Privacy
children.content:
Our Service is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe that your child has provided us with personal data, please contact us immediately at privacy@somedia.techbe.me so that we can remove this information.

For users between 13 and 18 years old, we recommend supervision by parents or legal guardians.

thirdPartyLinks.heading: 13. Links to Third-Party Sites
thirdPartyLinks.content:
Our Service may contain links to websites, services, or applications operated by third parties that are not operated by us. We have no control over the content and privacy practices of these sites and do not assume responsibility for their policies.

We recommend that you review the privacy policy of each site you visit, especially when connecting social media accounts (Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, TikTok, X, Threads), as each platform has its own privacy practices.

changes.heading: 14. Changes to This Policy
changes.content:
We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices, legislation, or the services offered.

We will notify you of material changes by:
- Email to the registered address
- Notice on the platform upon login
- Updating the 'Last updated' date at the top of this page

Changes take effect immediately upon publication, unless otherwise specified. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new policy.

contact.heading: 15. Contact Us
contact.content:
If you have questions, concerns, or requests related to this Privacy Policy or the processing of your personal data, please contact us:

Email: privacy@somedia.techbe.me
Website: https://somedia.techbe.me

For data protection issues in Brazil, you may also contact the National Data Protection Authority (ANPD):
Website: https://www.gov.br/anpd

For issues in the European Union, you may contact the data protection authority of your country of residence.

metadata.title: Terms of Service
metadata.description: Terms of Service for SoMedia - Social Media Manager

acceptance.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content:
By accessing or using SoMedia (the "Service"), you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to any part of these Terms, you may not access or use the Service.

These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you ("User", "you" or "your") and SoMedia ("Company", "we", "our" or "us"). Continued use of the Service after any changes to these Terms constitutes acceptance of those changes.

governingLaw.heading: 12. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governingLaw.content:
These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

Any dispute, controversy or claim arising out of or relating to these Terms or the use of the Service shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the District of Sao Paulo, State of Sao Paulo, Brazil.

You agree that any legal action must be commenced within one (1) year after the cause of action arises.

general.heading: 13. General Provisions
general.content:
These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and SoMedia regarding the use of the Service and supersede all prior or contemporaneous agreements, written or oral.

If any provision of these Terms is held to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.

Our failure to exercise or enforce any right or provision of these Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision.

You may not assign or transfer these Terms, by operation of law or otherwise, without our prior written consent. We may freely assign or transfer these Terms.

Notices may be sent by email or posted on the Service.

contact.heading: 14. Contact
contact.content:
If you have any questions, concerns or requests regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us:

Email: legal@somedia.techbe.me

Address:
SoMedia
Rua Exemplo, 123
Sao Paulo, SP, 01000-000
Brazil

We will respond within 30 (thirty) business days.
